signals.headline: Solana Validators Approve Alpenglow Upgrade, Slashing Finality to <200ms | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Validators Approve Alpenglow Upgrade, Slashing Finality to <200ms | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, which reworks Solana’s consensus layer for near-instant transaction settlement, was approved by validators last week, positioning SOL for high-frequency trading and real-time payments that outpace Ethereum L1.[1]
